ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "make" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "trim" INTEGER /* Reference to the trim level of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" INTEGER /* Reference to the transmission type */,
  "wheel_drive" INTEGER /* Reference to the wheel drive type */,
  "fuel_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel type */,
  "body_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the body type */,
  "color" INTEGER /* Reference to the color */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Reference to the location */,
  "VIN" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "interior_color" TEXT /* Interior color of the vehicle */,
  "exterior_features" TEXT /* Text field for listing exterior features */,
  "interior_features" TEXT /* Text field for listing interior features */,
  "is_sold" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle has been sold */,
  "date_listed" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was listed */,
  "date_sold" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was sold */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_body_type FOREIGN KEY ("body_type") REFERENCES body_types ("body_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make FOREIGN KEY ("make") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_color FOREIGN KEY ("color") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_type FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_trim FOREIGN KEY ("trim") REFERENCES trims ("trim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_wheel_drive FOREIGN KEY ("wheel_drive") REFERENCES wheel_drives ("wheel_drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission FOREIGN KEY ("transmission") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the make (e.g., Ford, Toyota) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., F-250, Corolla) */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the model */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the vehicle model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trims" (
  "trim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trim */,
  "trim_name" TEXT /* Name of the trim (e.g., Lariat, LE) */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the trim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Houston Texas, Walker Louisiana) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the location */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wheel_drives" (
  "wheel_drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wheel drive type */,
  "wheel_drive_name" TEXT /* Name of the wheel drive type (e.g., 4WD, FWD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wheel_drive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., Diesel, Gasoline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_types" (
  "body_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body type */,
  "body_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the body type (e.g., Truck, Sedan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("body_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color (e.g., Red, White) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website (e.g., eBay, Cars.com) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the website is active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the website information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle being listed */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the website where the vehicle is listed */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the listing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the listing */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle in the listing */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the listing */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date the listing was posted */,
  "date_removed" TEXT /* Date the listing was removed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., Active, Sold, Archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., Clean, Salvage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles_conditions" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "condition_id")
)
